full_text:
Images were captured on 19.03.2024 by JJ and AE using the Invitrogen EVOS XL Core Imaging System, located in the cell culture room. 
This folder contains images taken at 4x, 10x, 20x, and 40x magnification. 
The images were using a Counting Chamber, Bürker-Türk BLAUBRAND® (ref. 719505, depth = 0.100 mm).

The chamber features a ruling with 9 large squares, each measuring 1 mm². 
These large squares are subdivided into 16 smaller squares, each with 0.2 mm sides. 
Within the central large square, each group of smaller squares is further subdivided into 16 mini squares, each measuring 0.05 mm on each side, or 0.0025 mm².

Use these images to create a scale bar for the images taken with this microscopy.
